questions.label: Where will the server run?
questions.help: Local stdio for Claude Desktop/Code, or an HTTP server for Docker/systemd.

questions.label: logo.dev publishable key
questions.help: pk_... key from the logo.dev dashboard. Enables the get_logo tool. Leave blank to hide it.

questions.label: logo.dev secret key
questions.help: sk_... key from the logo.dev dashboard. Enables search_brands, describe_company, and get_brand. Leave blank to hide them.

questions.label: Bearer token
questions.help: Any non-empty string enables bearer auth. Browser-only.
